type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The addition of a number of new landfill gas collection wells has significantly increased our landfill gas capture.  Thus, flared/consumed LFG has led to increased particulate matter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The addition of a number of new landfill gas collection wells has significantly increased our landfill gas capture.  Thus, flared/consumed LFG has led to increased particulate matter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous estimation method used the emission factor provided by Environment Canada for Biogas Flare calculation.  After consulting with emission specialists, they have recommended an emission factor of 12kg/ 10^3 m3 CH4 for PM2.5, PM10 and TPM.  This emission factor was obtained from the US EPA Compilation of Air Pollutant Emissions Factors (AP-42).

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Previous estimation method used the emission factor provided by Environment Canada for Biogas Flare calculation.  After consulting with emission specialists, they have recommended an emission factor of 12kg/ 10^3 m3 CH4 for PM2.5, PM10 and TPM.  This emission factor was obtained from the US EPA Compilation of Air Pollutant Emissions Factors (AP-42).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous estimation method used the emission factor provided by Environment Canada for Biogas Flare calculation.  After consulting with emission specialists, they have recommended an emission factor of 0.27kg/ 10^3 m3 CH4 for PM2.5, PM10 and TPM.  This emission factor was obtained from the US EPA Compilation of Air Pollutant Emissions Factors (AP-42).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility has been expanded to include within its scope a reciprocating engine for on-site power production. Total gas production levels have not significantly varied year over year, with the increase in emissions instead directly attributable to a change in the process design/operating philosophy in 2024.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The facility has been expanded to include within its scope a reciprocating engine for on-site power production. Total gas production levels have not significantly varied year over year, with the increase in emissions instead directly attributable to a change in the process design/operating philosophy in 2024.
